about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know who I am and what I do
about.bio: I am an Informatics student at Universitas Teknologi Yogyakarta with a passion for web and mobile development. With experience across various projects ranging from competitions, freelance work, to thesis research, I continuously sharpen my skills to create impactful digital solutions. I believe that great technology is one that solves real-world problems in an elegant and accessible way.
